name: questiona
description: Questiona — AI-powered chat with your documents and databases.

scripts.setup: cd server && yarn && cd ../collector && yarn && cd ../frontend && yarn && yarn prisma:setup && echo "Setup complete! Run: yarn dev:all"
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev --name init
scripts.prisma:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
scripts.prisma:setup: yarn prisma:generate && yarn prisma:migrate && yarn prisma:seed
